policy: Every live failure is either resolved or explicitly time-bounded with an owner.

exceptions.reason: Current provider/retrieval pairing has unstable clean-control faithfulness scores; refresh and resolve before promoting live evidence to a release gate.
Current provider/judge pairing has clean-control relevancy failures; this is visible evidence, not a passing release signal.
A clean tool-use control failed in the committed run and must be rechecked against the default provider.
